{{CargoRelic
|name=Hunter License
|class_id=20002
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=There's a group of people called Hunters that persistently pursue precious and rare items. To become a Hunter, one must pass a rigorous examination and obtain a license, which will grant all kinds of privileges.
|fame=20
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=30
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 1k Power, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1k Power, Snail DEF +3<br>Power: 40000/40000
|ss2=Per 1k Power, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1k Power, Snail DEF +3<br>Power: 40000/40000
|ss3=Per 1k Power, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1k Power, Snail DEF +3<br>Power: 40000/40000
|ss4=Per 1k Power, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1k Power, Snail DEF +3<br>Power: 40000/40000
|ss7=Per 1k Power, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 1k Power, Snail DEF +3<br>Power: 40000/40000<br> (Awakened)
}}
